data.message: Adopt the manifest-bound CRSP-v2 point-in-time industry-neutral momentum campaign; treat the 2018-2019 legacy run as historical-only because its stated holdout was used for selection and its recovered CRSP provenance is incomplete.
data.rationale: The live 2005-2025 CRSP-v2, stocknames, delists, DSI, and Ken French authorities support a stronger untouched 2023-2025 final holdout, while the legacy RC p-value is 0.941 and ticket 35 explicitly optimized holdout Sharpe.

data.message: Live source audit matched protocol SHA256 b51d50ccfcf1cc368558d49afc5bd9386120efe92bdd03a7d43d7791be971743: 21 CRSP-v2 partitions, 40,402,817 rows, stocknames_v2, stkdelists, DSI, and three Ken French digests; holdout_outcomes_read=false. Native test-fast passed 135 tests and restricted-data policy scanned 1,075 files successfully.

data.summary: Predeclared CRSP-v2 flagship adapter is repaired, independently accepted, source-audited, strictly verified, reconciled into the canonical SSD repo, and published on scoped/recovery branches. Empirical execution is intentionally moved to a dedicated memory-heavy lifecycle; no full panel or performance result has yet been run.

data.goal: Build and validate the full real-data CRSP-v2 selection panel through 2022, execute the frozen six-candidate flagship selection with strong baselines, and freeze the selected model without opening final-holdout outcomes

data.message: Run the sole memory-heavy microalpha selection build at code tree 579e65f4 and protocol f88df6c9 with DuckDB memory_limit=4GB, SSD-local temp spill, and no-clobber run root 20260710T232307Z_selection. Audit all 21 manifested 2005-2025 partition headers, but open outcome rows only for the 18 partitions through 2022; do not open 2023-2025 daily outcomes or materialize post-validation side rows.
data.rationale: This follows the corrected frozen access contract, fits the 36GB host with a bounded 4GB DuckDB allocation and 749GB free SSD spill capacity, and preserves the final holdout.

data.message: Bounded CRSP-v2 overlap reconciliation opened only the 18 permitted daily partitions through 2022: 27 PERMNOs, 92,027 affected daily rows, zero rows without a date-valid stocknames record, 21,837 overlapping daily rows, and zero nulls in every daily point-in-time universe/industry field (ticker alone had 612 nulls and is not an eligibility field). Attribute disagreement is real—especially SIC, conditional type, and exchange—so stocknames cannot safely override the direct CIZ daily row.
data.ref: CRSP CIZ/SIZ cross-reference plus live 2005-2022 aggregate diagnostic

data.message: For the CRSP-v2 panel, use each CIZ daily row as the authoritative point-in-time source for PERMCO, SIC, universe filters, exchange/status, and ticker. Treat stocknames_v2 as a date-coverage audit only: require at least one date-valid record, report overlaps, and never overwrite direct daily attributes from an ambiguous name-history view.
data.rationale: Official CIZ documentation places point-in-time security/issuer fields directly on the time-series row; the live bounded diagnostic found complete daily eligibility fields but conflicting overlapping stocknames states. This semantics correction is frozen before any candidate performance is observed.

data.message: Retire the artificial 4GB DuckDB cap after two distinct execution methods both reached the same 3.7GiB internal allocation ceiling during rolling-feature materialization. Run the committed same-filesystem spill implementation once at a bounded 12GB DuckDB limit with two threads; keep microalpha as the portfolio's sole memory-heavy lane and keep all restricted WRDS bytes local.
data.rationale: Live headroom is approximately 18.4GiB, so a 12GB engine cap leaves material operating-system headroom. The prior failures were resource-bound after the source-semantics correction, not logic failures; AWS transfer remains unnecessary and unlicensed.
data.ref: live memory_pressure -Q: 51% free of 36GiB; commits 6830c61f and f366e5da

data.message: The committed 12GB/two-thread selection build completed in 86.45s with 8.82GB peak RSS and zero swap. Artifact 4ed2b33e2496e224a7701c3d0d71d593909d8fc7547ecdcbc483b2c83686206a contains 1,587,343 monthly rows, 18,013 PERMNOs, 338,428 eligible rows, and 8,508 delisting pseudo-days through 2022. All 18 permitted daily partitions were opened; no 2023-2025 outcome partition or post-validation side-table row was materialized.

Freeze the CRSP-v2 selection implementation at commit 27a05381 before observing any candidate return: signal windows are formation lags 1..11 and 1..5 (realization-relative t-12..t-2 and t-6..t-2), all six candidates share the same t+1 mapping, constrained execution LP, costs, eligibility gates, and lexicographic reducer. The historical 40-name row is included as hash-bound noncomparable evidence.
data.rationale: The runner passed 150 native tests, restricted-data policy, focused chronology/delist/capacity/reducer/baseline/tamper/no-clobber tests, and real baseline coverage checks before candidate metrics were viewed.

data.message: Correct the frozen selection execution-availability rule before any candidate metrics exist: a requested position with no following-month observed trading session receives zero executable delta, while an already-held security with no row is carried at an unchanged mark with last observed point-in-time metadata until a session or delisting appears. Any present realized row without a CIZ return remains a hard stop. Replay all six candidates and baselines from scratch at commit 8692b90a.
data.rationale: The stopped pre-metric run found two requested names (0.6419% absolute target weight) with no January 2017 panel/raw row, price, ADV, flag, or delisting record. There was no next session on which the order could execute, so treating them as filled positions with missing returns was incorrect. Focused chronology, constrained-capacity, absent-session, delisting, and return tests pass.

data.message: Bounded identifier-free diagnostic at code 8692b90a and panel 4ed2b33e classified the replay hard stop: one carried validation-period position in March 2017 maps to 23 CIZ NT/status-X placeholder rows, with zero executable-price, numeric-return, or delisting rows. No identifiers, raw rows, candidate metrics, or post-2022 outcome partitions were emitted or opened.

Predeclare the repaired replay semantics before any candidate metric: next-month trade availability still requires a positive observed price; a held name with a wholly absent month or a present CIZ placeholder month containing no price, numeric return, or delisting is carried unchanged with prior point-in-time metadata and cannot receive a trade; a numeric return remains the authoritative mark even if no price is available; any present row with an executable price or delisting but no CIZ return remains a hard stop. Replay the unchanged frozen six-candidate grid and reducer from scratch.
data.rationale: The bound diagnostic found only non-trading NT/status-X placeholders at the failure edge: 23 source rows, zero executable-price, return, or delisting rows. The correction distinguishes session evidence from derived monthly-row existence without using candidate outcomes or weakening the executable missing-return stop.

data.message: The predeclared placeholder correction is committed locally at d1221ee7/tree 7da2e4ee and published through the GitHub connector at remote commit 9745b5b1 with the identical tree 7da2e4ee on branch portfolio-os/microalpha-selection-execution-20260710. Exact checks passed: 21/21 targeted CRSP-v2 tests, 150/150 fast tests, restricted-data policy, run-log validation, local-source import, focused Ruff, and diff checks.

The frozen six-candidate validation replay completed in 41.71s at 1.163GB peak RSS with zero swap. All six candidates satisfied structural eligibility; the predeclared lexicographic reducer froze blend_12_2_6_2__inverse_vol_126d. Independent review verified all 10 artifact hashes, 72 validation months, exact reducer order, panel/protocol bindings, exposure/cap invariants, zero restricted identifier columns, and zero final-holdout outcome access. Validation evidence is modest rather than promotional: net HAC Sharpe 0.2407 (t=0.8398), CAGR 1.70%, max drawdown 11.42%; it trails the identical-universe classic by 0.0853 Sharpe and CRSP value-weighted market by 0.3904, and the harshest predeclared cost stress is -0.0915 Sharpe. No alpha or promotion claim is supported before the sealed holdout.

MICROALPHA-CANONICAL-VERIFY-001: the validation selection and frozen model are complete and independently audited, but two-phase Project OS finish is withheld because the trusted registry validates the dirty canonical checkout rather than exact sibling-worktree tree 7da2e4ee/artifact 09f7d524. The canonical checkout contains unrelated post-pause uncommitted panel/test edits that must be preserved; validating or overwriting it would not prove this result. Reconcile the exact published tree without losing those bytes or add an artifact/worktree-bound verifier, then verify and finish.
data.rationale: The configured verifier and registry root do not bind the executed sibling worktree or external result artifact, while the canonical checkout has overlapping uncommitted work from the prior manager. Project OS evidence must match the exact code tree and result generation.

data.message: MICROALPHA-CANONICAL-VERIFY-001 resolved: unrelated canonical bytes are preserved on codex/microalpha-canonical-wip-preserve-20260711 at 44b67acc, and canonical execution authority now derives from exact selected-worktree tree 7da2e4ee with the shared journal retained.
data.rationale: The unrelated canonical WIP is preserved at 44b67acc; the canonical checkout now derives from exact executed tree 7da2e4ee with the complete shared event journal restored, so native verification can bind the result code generation without overwriting prior bytes.

The selected blend is a valid freeze but weak negative evidence: Sharpe 0.2407 and below classic/market baselines, so no alpha or promotion claim is made.

data.summary: Completed the exact CRSP-v2 selection panel and frozen six-candidate replay with independent artifact audit, exact canonical-tree reconciliation, strict native verification, and no final-holdout access. The selected blend is a valid freeze but weak negative evidence: Sharpe 0.2407 and below classic/market baselines, so no alpha or promotion claim is made.

data.goal: Replace the weak CRSP-v2 momentum blend with a predeclared, economically distinct real-data signal family using only the permitted 2005-2022 development/validation partitions; build a small fixed hypothesis set, run capacity/cost/baseline-robust validation, and either freeze a genuinely stronger candidate or archive the family honestly without opening the 2023-2025 final holdout.

data.message: Predeclared a three-candidate FF12-industry-residual momentum family with a fixed unit reversal control, equal weighting, unchanged costs/capacity, a primary HAC-Sharpe reducer, and an explicit archive-or-freeze gate before any validation outcome was computed.
data.rationale: The prior six-candidate raw momentum family was valid but weak; residualizing industry drift and isolating a fixed reversal control is an economically distinct method change with fewer researcher degrees of freedom.

data.message: Executed the frozen three-candidate residual family at runner commit ecb3def0 on panel SHA 4ed2b33e. All three candidates were structurally eligible; residual_mom_12_2__equal led with HAC Sharpe 0.3198097303, CAGR 0.0248222944, and max drawdown 0.0939307328. It improved the previous winner by 0.0791233543, trailed classic momentum at 0.3259702072, and harsh-stress CAGR was -0.0020076684. All nine manifest-listed artifacts rehashed exactly, the previous baseline rerun matched four frozen metrics, make test-fast passed 153 tests, and every bound receipt says final_holdout_outcomes_read=false.
Archive the preregistered residual-momentum family as a validation negative; do not freeze it for final-holdout execution and do not open the 2023-2025 holdout.
data.rationale: The family failed three frozen replacement checks: less than 0.10 Sharpe improvement over the prior winner, below identical-universe classic momentum, and negative CAGR under the harsh cost/borrow stress. Retuning after observing these outcomes would violate the preregistration.

The best candidate improved HAC Sharpe from 0.2407 to 0.3198 but failed the frozen replacement gate, so the family was archived honestly without promotion or retuning.

data.goal: Evaluate one preregistered point-in-time FF12-industry-neutral low-volatility mechanism using only trailing 126-session volatility on the permitted CRSP-v2 data through 2022, with unchanged portfolio, execution, cost, capacity, and baseline contracts; freeze only if the fixed strength and harsh-stress gates pass, otherwise archive honestly without opening the 2023-2025 final holdout or retuning.

data.message: Predeclared a single point-in-time FF12-industry-neutral low-volatility mechanism at commit 212e7f46 before observing validation outcomes: score equals negative trailing 126-session volatility, equal weighting, unchanged ten-percent sleeves, costs, capacity, and baselines, with fixed strength and harsh-stress gates.
data.rationale: The repository already provides formation-time volatility_126d built only from rows through formation month-end. A low-risk anomaly tests leverage-constraint and lottery-demand economics without past-return direction, momentum blending, coefficient fitting, or another weighting sweep.

data.message: Executed the one-candidate low-volatility mechanism at runner commit 212e7f46 on panel SHA 4ed2b33e. Net HAC Sharpe was -0.0905962960, t-stat -0.1942501044, CAGR -0.0220070966, and max drawdown 0.4383163777, failing structural eligibility. At 600 bps borrow plus 2x nonborrow costs, Sharpe was -0.2552606990 and CAGR -0.0440863604. All eight manifest-listed artifacts rehashed exactly, the archived residual baseline matched four exact metrics, and every bound receipt says final_holdout_outcomes_read=false.
Archive the point-in-time low-volatility mechanism as a validation negative; do not invert, threshold, reweight, or otherwise retune it, and do not open the 2023-2025 holdout.
data.rationale: The candidate failed every frozen strength gate and the structural drawdown gate; harsh costs worsened the result. Any direction inversion or parameter adjustment after observing this outcome would be a new mechanism requiring a separate preregistration.

data.goal: Evaluate one preregistered pure short-horizon FF12-industry-residual reversal mechanism using only the formation-month residual return available at month-end, with next-month execution and unchanged CRSP-v2 portfolio, cost, capacity, and baseline contracts; freeze only if fixed strength and harsh-stress gates pass, otherwise archive without retuning or opening the 2023-2025 final holdout.

data.message: Predeclared one pure short-term FF12-industry-residual reversal mechanism at commit 4f3cb1ab before validation outcomes: score equals the negative formation-month residual return, equal weighting, next-month execution, unchanged ten-percent sleeves, costs, capacity, baselines, and fixed strength gates.
data.rationale: This is a method change from momentum and low volatility: it tests temporary firm-specific liquidity shocks or overreaction using only information known at formation month-end, with no fitted coefficient, threshold, or outcome-conditioned direction.

data.message: Executed the single pure short-term industry-residual reversal mechanism at runner commit 4f3cb1ab on panel SHA 4ed2b33e. Net HAC Sharpe was -0.4542094048, t-stat -1.4130926298, CAGR -0.0381848030, max drawdown 0.2343672122, and one-way turnover 63.2741443254. At 600 bps borrow plus 2x nonborrow costs, Sharpe was -1.0267928307 and CAGR -0.0809848919. All eight manifest-listed artifacts rehashed exactly, the strongest archived baseline matched four exact metrics, and all bound receipts say final_holdout_outcomes_read=false.

Archive the pure short-term reversal mechanism; do not invert its direction or fit thresholds after observing the negative result. Treat repeated weak CRSP-only mechanisms as a plateau and move the next research frontier to a separately justified data/economic mechanism.
data.rationale: The candidate failed all performance and harsh-stress gates with 63.27x turnover. Post-hoc continuation inversion would be outcome-conditioned. Momentum, residual momentum, low volatility, and reversal now provide enough evidence to stop transforming the same small CRSP-only field set.

data.goal: Inventory present point-in-time accounting, fundamental, and link-history data without authentication; predeclare and execute the strongest economically distinct leakage-safe quality, value, profitability, or investment mechanism feasible from present data, preserving restricted-data boundaries and keeping the 2023-2025 final holdout sealed

data.message: Read-only local inventory found annual and quarterly Compustat partitions for 2005-2025, CCM link table and link history, Compustat company metadata, and public SEC submissions/companyfacts archives. Annual 2005-2022 has 205,695 rows with zero duplicate gvkey-datadate keys; the quarterly projection lacks rdq. Complete annual composite coverage on the sealed selection panel is 1,092 to 1,278 names per formation month with zero ambiguous primary LC/LU CCM mappings. No WRDS login or Duo flow was triggered.

Predeclare exactly one annual quality-value-profitability-investment composite at commit b46796df. Open only annual Compustat 2005-2022, use a six-month lag and 18-month expiry, reject ambiguous primary CCM mappings and incomplete features, apply equal FF12-industry family ranks and unchanged portfolio/cost rules, and keep all 2023-2025 outcomes sealed regardless of validation result.
data.rationale: This is a genuine economic and data-method change after four CRSP-only mechanisms plateaued. Equal family ranks and fixed availability, expiry, link, cost, coverage, and performance gates are frozen before any candidate return is computed. The current Compustat snapshot is explicitly not treated as vintage accounting evidence.

data.message: Executed the single preregistered annual QVPI composite at runner commit 613ce293 on the sealed panel SHA 4ed2b33e. It was structurally valid with 1,092-1,278 complete names per month and zero ambiguous CCM mappings, but net HAC Sharpe was -0.0233941934, t-stat -0.0461941855, CAGR -0.0056231585, max drawdown 0.3217401556, and total one-way turnover 14.3333720288. At 600 bps borrow plus 2x nonborrow costs, Sharpe was -0.2782251550 and CAGR -0.0271494469. All nine aggregate artifacts rehashed exactly; restricted identifier rows written were zero; 2023-2025 Compustat and CRSP outcomes remained unopened.

Archive the exact QVPI annual snapshot mechanism as a validation negative. Do not retune or open the 2023-2025 final holdout; preserve the result and move any future accounting work to a separately preregistered true-vintage data mechanism.
data.rationale: The exact composite failed the frozen Sharpe, improvement, CAGR, drawdown, and harsh-stress gates while passing structural and coverage gates. Changing signs, weights, lags, missing-value rules, or costs after this observation would be post-hoc tuning. The next defensible frontier must change the data generation, most plausibly a genuine first-filed SEC vintage construction or another independently justified point-in-time dataset.

data.rationale: The mechanism materially beat frozen momentum and had positive primary CAGR, but missed the preregistered absolute 0.50 Sharpe gate and failed both harsh-stress economic gates. Post-outcome changes would be selection on validation.

data.message: Verified the frozen SEC submissions, company bridge, CCM link, selection panel, panel manifest, and base protocol digests without projecting any return column. A 12-CIK evenly spaced metadata pilot found 96 original XBRL 10-Ks and 85 valid consecutive timing pairs across 11 CIKs; no post-cutoff or outcome row was selected.

Predeclare exactly one SEC reporting-timeliness quality mechanism: equal within-industry ranks of negative current report-to-acceptance delay and prior-delay minus current-delay. Keep validation execution disabled until explicit re-admission after the FJS full generation.
data.rationale: The mechanism is economically and informationally distinct from rejected accounting-value signals, uses exact first-original-10-K acceptance timestamps, and can be implemented and tested without consuming the memory-heavy empirical lane or reading returns.

data.message: Freeze validation exactly as preregistered: sec_reporting_timeliness_quality equals the equal mean of the two unchanged within-industry ranks with unchanged signs; use the existing SEC-vintage selection, capacity, transaction-cost, borrow-cost, and HAC evaluator; compare only the exact frozen baseline set; execute the declared four-point stress grid and one primary candidate run; apply the unchanged gates once. Permit reading selection-panel return columns only from 2017-01-31 through 2022-12-31. Forbid 2023-2025 access, adaptation after outcomes, AWS, authentication, raw identifier persistence, and any retry after an unknown or completed outcome.
data.rationale: The real metadata gate passed strongly and the portfolio manager explicitly authorized one frozen 2017-2022 validation lifecycle. The 2023-2025 holdout remains outside authority.

data.message: Executed the frozen 2017-2022 SEC reporting-timeliness validation exactly once. Candidate was structurally eligible and exactly net/industry neutral but produced HAC Sharpe -0.6194121316820743, HAC t-stat -1.3497678136278342, CAGR -0.023489341412892384, maximum drawdown 0.1960744162414998, and cumulative return -0.1329144918948152. Archived frozen momentum Sharpe was 0.24068637598141043. Harsh 600 bps borrow and 2x nonborrow stress produced Sharpe -1.18817520577202 and CAGR -0.043802756772718277. Only the drawdown, structural, chronology, coverage, and neutrality gates passed; all return and harsh-economic promotion gates failed. The final holdout remained sealed and zero identifier rows were written.
Archive sec_reporting_timeliness_quality__equal unchanged as a validation negative. Do not invert, retune, rerun, or open the final holdout for this mechanism.
data.rationale: The one authorized result failed the preregistered Sharpe, relative-Sharpe, CAGR, and both harsh-stress gates. The fail rule forbids changing signs, weights, filing selection, delay bounds, expiry, costs, or thresholds after outcomes.
